notes: Paper PDF not accessible (paywall; not OA despite PMC listing). Validation against physiological targets and qualitative paper findings. Spin-up: 5 days at rtol=1e-6/atol=1e-8 (day-5 Na balance residual < 0.5%). FLAG-1: vasf coefficient corrected 11.312→1.1e-5. FLAG-2: autonomic block interpreted as epsilon_aum≈aauto. FLAG-3: water reab coefficient: K_wreab=0.659 derived from mass balance. FLAG-4: nu_md_sod denominator 1843→0.1843. FLAG-5: xi_ksod=1. FLAG-6: PB+Pgo=40mmHg, Kgcf=0.0126. FLAG-7: K_wreab=0.659 from water balance constraint. FLAG-9: TGF iteration uses damped FP (alpha=0.25) not naive substitution.
